visualization.description: Stacked bar chart showing churn distribution by gender and age groups (binned 10-year intervals). Age groups are displayed through faceted columns.

effect.description: Filters subsequent views to show data for selected demographic segment

visualization.description: Bubble chart showing relationship between customer lifetime value, satisfaction, and churn status

effect.description: Shows detailed tooltip with individual customer attributes

visualization.description: Multi-line chart comparing churn rate trends over time between senior/non-senior customers

encodings: color: Monthly Charges → Red-blue diverging scale
visualization.description: Detailed table view showing individual customer financials and churn details

outputs.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) showing churn distribution across demographics. After selecting a gender/age segment, Views 2-4 update to show CLTV-satisfaction patterns (Exploration), tenure trends (Insight), and individual records (Detail). Clicking notable data points in View 2 drills down to specific customer details in View 4.
